summary: Iteration 67 - Cooperative Code Auto-Generation Feature Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 1) POST /api/auth/register with user_type=cooperative auto-generates coop_code in COOP-XXX-NNN format. 2) Response includes coop_code and coop_name in user object. 3) Department 'DALO' generates COOP-DAL-XXX prefix. 4) Without department, uses coop_name prefix. 5) Non-cooperative types (acheteur, producteur, fournisseur, entreprise_rse) still work. 6) GET /api/auth/cooperatives returns list with code, name, region. 7) Frontend /register shows 'Nom de la cooperative' field for cooperatives. 8) Cooperative success page shows auto-generated code with 'Mon tableau de bord' and 'Completer mon profil' buttons. 9) Farmer /farmer/inscription has cooperative dropdown (Select) with name + code format. 10) 'Aucune / Independant' option available.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: generate_coop_code() uses coop_code_counters MongoDB collection for sequence tracking
auth.py: PREFIX from department code (first 3 chars) or coop_name (first 3 chars after removing 'COOP')
auth.py: register endpoint sets coop_name and coop_code for cooperative user_type
auth.py: GET /api/auth/cooperatives is public endpoint returning active cooperatives with code, name, region
auth_models.py: UserCreate has coop_name field for cooperative registration
Register.jsx: Shows 'Nom de la cooperative' field when userType='cooperative' with data-testid='coop-name-input'
Register.jsx: registrationResult state shows success page with coop_code from result.user.coop_code
Register.jsx: Success page has 'Mon tableau de bord' and 'Completer mon profil' buttons with data-testid
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: Loads cooperatives via GET /api/auth/cooperatives on mount
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: Cooperative field is Select dropdown showing 'name (code)' format
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: First option is 'Aucune / Independant' with value='none'
seed_data_creation: Multiple test cooperatives created during testing with auto-generated codes (COOP-DAL-003, COOP-SOU-001, COOP-OUE-001, COOP-ABI-001, COOP-ABI-002, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cooperative code auto-generation feature fully implemented and tested. generate_coop_code() in auth.py uses coop_code_counters MongoDB collection (similar to farmer_code_counters). PREFIX from department (first 3 chars) or coop_name. Register.jsx shows coop_name field for cooperatives and success page with auto-generated code. RegisterFarmerPage.jsx loads cooperatives via GET /api/auth/cooperatives and shows dropdown with 'name (code)' format. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.
